It cleaves pre-tRNA at the 5'- and 3'-splice sites to release the intron. The products are an intron and two tRNA half-molecules bearing 2',3'-cyclic phosphate and 5'-OH termini. There are no conserved sequences at the splice sites, but the intron is invariably located at the same site in the gene, placing the splice sites an invariant distance from the constant structural features of the tRNA body;em_max_annot_lvl=33208|Metazoa;em_Preferred_name=TSEN34;em_EC=3.1.27.9;em_KEGG_ko=ko:K15323;em_BRITE=ko00000,ko03016;em_PFAMs=tRNA_int_endo;em_GOs=GO:0000213,GO:0000379,GO:0000394,GO:0003674,GO:0003824,GO:0004518,GO:0004519,GO:0004521,GO:0004540,GO:0004549,GO:0005575,GO:0005622,GO:0005623,GO:0005634,GO:0005654,GO:0006139,GO:0006388,GO:0006396,GO:0006399,GO:0006725,GO:0006807,GO:0008033,GO:0008150,GO:0008152,GO:0008380,GO:0009987,GO:0010467,GO:0016070,GO:0016787,GO:0016788,GO:0016892,GO:0016894,GO:0031974,GO:0031981,GO:0034470,GO:0034641,GO:0034660,GO:0043170,GO:0043226,GO:0043227,GO:0043229,GO:0043231,GO:0043233,GO:0044237,GO:0044238,GO:0044422,GO:0044424,GO:0044428,GO:0044446,GO:0044464,GO:0046483,GO:0070013,GO:0071704,GO:0090304,GO:0090305,GO:0090501,GO:0090502,GO:0140098,GO:0140101,GO:1901360
